Localization.Description: A file is removed from a ProFTPd server

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user from host {src.host} authenticated as "{datafield2}" removed file {object.fullpath} from the ProFTPd server on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} is removing file {object.fullpath} from the ProFTPd server on host {event_src.host}
A user from host {src.host} authenticated as "{datafield2}" is removing file {object.fullpath} from the ProFTPd server on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} removed file {object.fullpath} from the ProFTPd server on host {event_src.host}
